```{r bacteremia_pre_ferritin_subgroup_aa_km}
          surv.median.line = "hv", # Specify median survival
          ggtheme = theme_bw(), # Change ggplot2 theme
          xlab = "Time (Years)",   # customize X axis label.
          ylab = "Overall Survival", 
          title = "Kaplan-Meier curves for bacteremia probability using pre-transplant ferritin levels --- aplastic anemia",
          legend.labs = c("Low", "Moderate", "High"),    # change legend labels.
          palette = c("red", "green", "blue"))
```

##### Multivariate Cox regression analysis: 
```{r bacteremia_pre_ferritin_subgroup_aa}
cox_sum(ferritin_bac_aa) %>% prettify_kable()
```

#### sickle cell disease
```{r bacteremia_pre_ferritin_subgroup_scd}
cox_sum(ferritin_bac_scd) %>% prettify_kable()
```

#### beta thalassemia major
```{r bacteremia_pre_ferritin_subgroup_btm}
cox_sum(ferritin_bac_btm) %>% prettify_kable()
```

#### Diamond-Blackfan anemia
```{r bacteremia_pre_ferritin_subgroup_dba}
cox_sum(ferritin_bac_dba) %>% prettify_kable()
```


## Bacteremia stratified by <span style="color:red">pre-transplant LIC levels</span>
### KM curves:
```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC_km}
pre_LIC_bac <- pre_LIC_cox %>% 
                          #filter(!(transplant_type_combined %in% c("autologous/genetherapy"))) %>%
                          # mutate(transplant_type_combined = relevel(transplant_type_combined, ref = "matched related"))
                          mutate(bacteremia = ifelse(is.na(bacteremia), FALSE, bacteremia))

table1(~ LIC_level_1_binary + age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined| bacteremia, 
      data = pre_LIC_bac %>% mutate(bacteremia = ifelse(!bacteremia, "No bacteremia", "Bacteremia")),
      caption = "Bacteremia 5-yr post transplant for LIC cut-off = 8 mg Fe/g dry wt-- entire cohort")

table1(~ LIC_level_1_binary | bacteremia + scd_type,
      data = pre_LIC_bac %>% mutate(bacteremia = ifelse(!bacteremia, "No bacteremia", "Bacteremia")),
      overall = FALSE,
      caption = "Bacteremia 5-yr post transplant for LIC cut-off = 8 mg Fe/g dry wt")

table1(~ LIC_level_1_binary | bacteremia + scd_type, 
      data = pre_LIC_bac %>% 
            mutate(bacteremia = ifelse(!bacteremia, "No bacteremia", "Bacteremia")) %>%
            mutate(LIC_level_1_binary = if_else(LIC <5, "low", "high")),
      overall = FALSE,
      caption = "Bacteremia 5-yr post transplant for LIC cut-off = 5 mg Fe/g dry wt")

km_LIC_bac <- survfit(Surv(bacteremia_time_1yr_censored/365.25, bacteremia) ~ LIC_level_1_binary,   
                    data = pre_LIC_bac)

ggsurvplot(km_LIC_bac,
          pval = TRUE, conf.int = FALSE,
          risk.table = TRUE, # Add risk table
          risk.table.col = "strata", # Change risk table color by groups
          linetype = "strata", # Change line type by groups
          surv.median.line = "hv", # Specify median survival
          ggtheme = theme_bw(), # Change ggplot2 theme
          xlab = "Time (Years)",   # customize X axis label.
          ylab = "Overall Survival", 
          title = "Kaplan-Meier curves for bacteremia probability using pre-transplant LIC levels",
          legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),    # change legend labels.
          palette = c("red", "blue"))
```

### Multivariate Cox regression analysis: 
- Cox proportional hazard model accounting for: 
  - Bacteremia vs no-bacteremia (ref) within 1 yr following transplant
  - LIC levels: high vs. low (ref), using the most recent LIC values with binary cut-off of 8 
  - Age, sex, transplant match
- Subgroup analyses: disease type

```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC, echo= FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 6}
# pre_ferritin_cox %>% group_by(survival_5yr, transplant_type_combined) %>% summarise(n = n_distinct(record_id)) %>% view()


# 0 is censored/survived, 1 is death
# exclude match_status and graft_manip
LIC_bac <- coxph(Surv(bacteremia_time_1yr_censored/365.25, bacteremia) ~ LIC_level_1_binary+ age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined, 
                data = pre_LIC_bac %>% mutate(no_bacteremia = ifelse(bacteremia, FALSE, TRUE)))

# pre_ferritin_cox_1 %>% group_by(ferritin_pre, gender, transplant_type_combined, has_busulfan) %>%
#                       summarise(n_distinct(record_id))
# visualiza the impact on iron levels
LIC_levels_df <- with(pre_LIC_bac,
               data.frame(LIC_level_1_binary = c("low", "high"), 
                          age_at_ce = rep(mean(age_at_ce, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
                          gender = rep("Female", 2),
                          transplant_type_combined = rep("matched related",2),
                          has_busulfan = rep("No", 2)
                          )
               )

fit <- survfit(LIC_bac, newdata = LIC_levels_df)
ggsurvplot(fit, data = LIC_levels_df, 
                  conf.int = FALSE, 
                  legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                  legend.title = "Pre-transplant LIC levels", 
                  xlab = "Years", ylab = "Probability of bacteremia",
                  xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, .5), 
                  risk.table = TRUE,
                  fun = "event",
                  palette = c("red", "blue"), # custom color palette
                  ggtheme = theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = plot_title_text_size),    # Title text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # Y-axis title size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size),  # X-axis labels size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size),   # Y-axis labels size
    legend.title = element_text(size = axis_text_size),    # Legend title size
    legend.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size))) #, risk.table.title = "test")
  
```

```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC_sum, echo= FALSE, message=FALSE}
# summary(res.cox)
cox_sum(LIC_bac) %>% prettify_kable()
```

### subgroup analysis

```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC_subgroup, echo= FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 6}
# table1(~ LIC_level_1_binary + age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined + scd_type| bacteremia, 
#       data = pre_LIC_bac %>% mutate(bacteremia = ifelse(!bacteremia, "No bacteremia", "Bacteremia")) %>%
#               filter(scd_type  == "Diamond-Blackfan anemia"))

# 0 is censored/survived, 1 is death
# exclude match_status and graft_manip
LIC_bac_aa <- coxph(Surv(bacteremia_time_1yr_censored/365.25, bacteremia) ~ LIC_level_1_binary+ age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined, 
                data = pre_LIC_bac %>% 
                      filter(scd_type == "aplastic anemia", transplant_type_combined != "autologous/genetherapy"))

LIC_bac_scd <- coxph(Surv(bacteremia_time_1yr_censored/365.25, bacteremia) ~ LIC_level_1_binary+ age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined, 
                data = pre_LIC_bac %>% 
                      filter(scd_type == "sickle cell disease") %>%
                      filter(transplant_type_combined != "Allogeneic: Cord Blood", , ignore.case = TRUE))

LIC_bac_btm <- coxph(Surv(bacteremia_time_1yr_censored/365.25, bacteremia) ~ LIC_level_1_binary+ age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined, 
                data = pre_LIC_bac %>% 
                      filter(scd_type == "beta thalassemia major"))

LIC_bac_dba <- coxph(Surv(bacteremia_time_1yr_censored/365.25, bacteremia) ~ LIC_level_1_binary+ age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined, 
                data = pre_LIC_bac %>% 
                      filter(scd_type == "Diamond-Blackfan anemia", !(transplant_type_combined %in% c("autologous/genetherapy", "Unknown"))))

# pre_ferritin_cox_1 %>% group_by(ferritin_pre, gender, transplant_type_combined, has_busulfan) %>%
#                       summarise(n_distinct(record_id))
# visualiza the impact on iron levels
LIC_levels_df <- with(pre_LIC_bac,
               data.frame(LIC_level_1_binary = c("low", "high"), 
                          age_at_ce = rep(mean(age_at_ce, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
                          gender = rep("Female", 2),
                          transplant_type_combined = rep("matched related",2),
                          has_busulfan = rep("No", 2)
                          )
               )

fit_aa <- survfit(LIC_bac_aa, newdata = LIC_levels_df)
fit_scd <- survfit(LIC_bac_scd, newdata = LIC_levels_df)
fit_btm <- survfit(LIC_bac_btm, newdata = LIC_levels_df)
fit_dba <- survfit(LIC_bac_dba, newdata = LIC_levels_df)

p_aa <- ggsurvplot(fit_aa, data = LIC_levels_df, 
                  conf.int = FALSE, 
                  # legend = "none",
                  title = "Aplastic anemia", 
                  legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                  legend.title = "Pre-transplant LIC levels", 
                  xlab = "Years", ylab = "Probability of bacteremia",
                  xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, .5), 
                  risk.table = TRUE,
                  fun = "event",
                  palette = c("red", "blue"), # custom color palette
                  ggtheme = theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = plot_title_text_size),    # Title text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # Y-axis title size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size),  # X-axis labels size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size),   # Y-axis labels size
    legend.title = element_text(size = axis_text_size),    # Legend title size
    legend.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size))) #, risk.table.title = "test")

p_scd <- ggsurvplot(fit_scd, data = LIC_levels_df, 
                  conf.int = FALSE, 
                  legend = "none",
                  title = "sickle cell anemia", 
                  # legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                  # legend.title = "Pre-transplant LIC levels", 
                  xlab = "Years", ylab = "Probability of bacteremia",
                  xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, .5), 
                  risk.table = TRUE,
                  fun = "event",
                  palette = c("red", "blue"), # custom color palette
                  ggtheme = theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = plot_title_text_size),    # Title text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # Y-axis title size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size),  # X-axis labels size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size),   # Y-axis labels size
    legend.title = element_text(size = axis_text_size),    # Legend title size
    legend.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size))) #, risk.table.title = "test")

p_btm <- ggsurvplot(fit_btm, data = LIC_levels_df, 
                  conf.int = FALSE, 
                  legend = "none",
                  title = "beta thalassemia major", 
                  # legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                  # legend.title = "Pre-transplant LIC levels", 
                  xlab = "Years", ylab = "Probability of bacteremia",
                  xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, .5), 
                  risk.table = TRUE,
                  fun = "event",
                  palette = c("red", "blue"), # custom color palette
                  ggtheme = theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = plot_title_text_size),    # Title text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # Y-axis title size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size),  # X-axis labels size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size),   # Y-axis labels size
    legend.title = element_text(size = axis_text_size),    # Legend title size
    legend.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size))) #, risk.table.title = "test")

p_dba <- ggsurvplot(fit_dba, data = LIC_levels_df, 
                  conf.int = FALSE, 
                  title = "Diamond-Blackfan anemia", 
                  legend = "none", 
                  xlab = "Years", ylab = "Probability of bacteremia",
                  xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, .5), 
                  risk.table = TRUE,
                  fun = "event",
                  palette = c("red", "blue"), # custom color palette
                  ggtheme = theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = plot_title_text_size),    # Title text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # Y-axis title size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size),  # X-axis labels size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size),   # Y-axis labels size
    legend.position = "none")) #, risk.table.title = "test")
  
grid.arrange(p_aa$plot, p_scd$plot, p_btm$plot, p_dba$plot, ncol = 2, nrow = 2)
```

#### aplastic anemia
##### KM curves
```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC_subgroup_aa_km}
km_LIC_bac <- survfit(Surv(bacteremia_time_1yr_censored/365.25, bacteremia) ~ LIC_level_1_binary,   
                    data = pre_LIC_bac %>% 
                    filter(scd_type == "aplastic anemia", transplant_type_combined != "autologous/genetherapy"))

ggsurvplot(km_LIC_bac,
          pval = TRUE, conf.int = FALSE,
          risk.table = TRUE, # Add risk table
          risk.table.col = "strata", # Change risk table color by groups
          linetype = "strata", # Change line type by groups
          surv.median.line = "hv", # Specify median survival
          ggtheme = theme_bw(), # Change ggplot2 theme
          xlab = "Time (Years)",   # customize X axis label.
          ylab = "Overall Survival", 
          title = "Kaplan-Meier curves for bacteremia probability using pre-transplant LIC levels --- aplastic anemia",
          legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),    # change legend labels.
          palette = c("red", "blue"))
```

##### Multivariate Cox regression analysis: 
```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC_subgroup_aa}
cox_sum(ferritin_bac_aa) %>% prettify_kable()
```

#### sickle cell disease
```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC_subgroup_scd}
cox_sum(ferritin_bac_scd) %>% prettify_kable()
```

#### beta thalassemia major
```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC_subgroup_btm}
cox_sum(ferritin_bac_btm) %>% prettify_kable()
```

#### Diamond-Blackfan anemia
```{r bacteremia_pre_LIC_subgroup_dba}
cox_sum(ferritin_bac_dba) %>% prettify_kable()
```

# VOD
## Odds of having VOD using <span style="color:red">pre-transplant ferritin levels</span>
- Multivariate logistic regression ONLY patients who received busulfan accounting for: 
  - VOD vs no-VOD (ref) within 90 days following transplant
  - Ferritin levels: low (ref), moderate, high (Can also consider < 3000/>3000)
  - Age, sex
- Subgroup analyses: disease type

```{r vod_preferritin, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
pre_ferritin_vod_lr <- pre_ferritin_cox %>% 
                          filter(has_busulfan == "Yes") %>%
                          mutate(vod = ifelse(vod, "Yes", "No")) %>%
                          mutate(vod= relevel(factor(vod), ref = "No")) %>%
                          mutate(transplant_type_combined = relevel(factor(transplant_type_combined), ref = "matched related"))

vod_fit <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  ferritin_pre,
            data = pre_ferritin_vod_lr, 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")

sjPlot::tab_model(vod_fit, title = "Odds of getting VOD for patients treated with bulsufan")

# sjPlot::tab_model(unweighted, title = "Odds of having masked hypertension for all age groups UNWEIGHTED")
p1 <- plot_summs(vod_fit, exp = TRUE)
require(sjPlot)
require(jtools)
require(broom.mixed)
p1 <- p1 + scale_y_discrete(labels = c("High ferritin", "Moderate ferritin", "Age at transplant", "Male")) + 
      labs(x = "Odds ratio", y = "")
print(p1)

table1(~scd_type|vod, data = pre_ferritin_vod_lr)
```

### subgroup analysis
```{r vod_preferritin_subgroups, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}

vod_fit_scd <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  ferritin_pre,
            data = pre_ferritin_vod_lr %>% filter(scd_type == "sickle cell disease"), 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")
vod_fit_btm <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  ferritin_pre,
            data = pre_ferritin_vod_lr %>% filter(scd_type == "beta thalassemia major"), 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")
vod_fit_dba <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  ferritin_pre,
            data = pre_ferritin_vod_lr %>% filter(scd_type == "Diamond-Blackfan anemia"), 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")
vod_fit_aa <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  ferritin_pre,
            data = pre_ferritin_vod_lr %>% filter(scd_type == "aplastic anemia"), 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")

export_summs(vod_fit_aa, vod_fit_scd, vod_fit_btm, vod_fit_dba, scale = TRUE,
             error_format = "[{conf.low}, {conf.high}]", #p = {p.value}, 
             exp = TRUE,
             model.names = c("aplastic anemia", "sickle cell disease", "beta thalassemia major", "Diamond-Blackfan anemia"))

# sjPlot::tab_model(unweighted, title = "Odds of having masked hypertension for all age groups UNWEIGHTED")
p2 <- plot_summs(vod_fit_aa, vod_fit_scd, vod_fit_btm, vod_fit_dba, 
        exp = TRUE,
        model.names = c("aplastic anemia", "sickle cell disease", "beta thalassemia major", "Diamond-Blackfan anemia"))
p2 <- p2 + scale_y_discrete(labels = c("High ferritin", "Moderate ferritin", "Age at transplant", "Male")) + 
      labs(x = "Odds ratio", y = "")
print(p2)

```

## Odds of having VOD using <span style="color:red">pre-transplant LIC levels</span>
- Multivariate logistic regression ONLY patients who received busulfan accounting for: 
  - VOD vs no-VOD (ref) within 90 days following transplant
  - LIC levels: low (ref), high
  - Groups: Low, moderate, high, if possible. 
  - Age, sex
- Subgroup analyses: disease type

```{r vod_preLIC, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
pre_LIC_vod_lr <- pre_LIC_cox %>% 
                          filter(has_busulfan == "Yes") %>%
                          mutate(vod = ifelse(vod, "Yes", "No")) %>%
                          mutate(vod= relevel(factor(vod), ref = "No")) %>%
                          mutate(transplant_type_combined = relevel(factor(transplant_type_combined), ref = "matched related"))

vod_fit <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  LIC_level_1_binary,
            data = pre_LIC_vod_lr, 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")

sjPlot::tab_model(vod_fit, title = "Odds of getting VOD for patients treated with bulsufan")

# sjPlot::tab_model(unweighted, title = "Odds of having masked hypertension for all age groups UNWEIGHTED")
p3 <- plot_summs(vod_fit, exp = TRUE)
require(sjPlot)
require(jtools)
require(broom.mixed)
p3 <- p3 + scale_y_discrete(labels = c("High LIC", "Age at transplant", "Male")) + 
      labs(x = "Odds ratio", y = "")
print(p3)

table1(~scd_type|vod, data = pre_LIC_vod_lr)
```

### subgroup analysis
- Omit aplastic anemia due to small sample size
```{r vod_preLIC_subgroups, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}

vod_fit_scd <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  LIC_level_1_binary,
            data = pre_LIC_vod_lr %>% filter(scd_type == "sickle cell disease"), 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")
vod_fit_btm <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  LIC_level_1_binary,
            data = pre_LIC_vod_lr %>% filter(scd_type == "beta thalassemia major"), 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")
vod_fit_dba <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  LIC_level_1_binary,
            data = pre_LIC_vod_lr %>% filter(scd_type == "Diamond-Blackfan anemia"), 
            family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")
# vod_fit_aa <- glm_weightit(formula = vod ~ gender + age_at_ce +  ferritin_pre,
#             data = pre_ferritin_vod_lr %>% filter(scd_type == "aplastic anemia"), 
#             family = "binomial", link = "logit", estimand = "ATT")

export_summs(vod_fit_scd, vod_fit_btm, vod_fit_dba, scale = TRUE,
             error_format = "[{conf.low}, {conf.high}]", #p = {p.value}, 
             exp = TRUE, 
             model.names = c("sickle cell disease", "beta thalassemia major", "Diamond-Blackfan anemia"))

# sjPlot::tab_model(unweighted, title = "Odds of having masked hypertension for all age groups UNWEIGHTED")
p4 <- plot_summs(vod_fit_scd, vod_fit_btm, vod_fit_dba, 
        exp = TRUE,
        model.names = c("sickle cell disease", "beta thalassemia major", "Diamond-Blackfan anemia"))
p4 <- p4 + scale_y_discrete(labels = c("High LIC", "Age at transplant", "Male")) + 
      labs(x = "Odds ratio", y = "")
print(p4)

```


# Ferritin vs. LIC correlation
- The ferritin value used should be the closest one to the LIC, within 6 months. If there is no ferritin within 6 months of the LIC, omit the values. 
- When there are more than 1 ferritin values within 6 months, take the closet one. 

```{r ferritin_LIC_corr}
LIC <- results_tbl("cr_data") %>% select(record_id, site, eligibility, LIC_date, LIC) %>%
            left_join(results_tbl("study_cohorts") %>% select(person_id, record_id), by = "record_id") %>%
            filter(!is.na(LIC))
ferritin <- results_tbl("covar_ferritin_mx") %>% select(person_id, ferritin, ferritin_date)

# get the closet measurements within 14 days
LIC_ferritin <- LIC %>% inner_join(ferritin, by = "person_id") %>%
    collect() %>%
    mutate(LIC_ferritin_period = abs(as.numeric(difftime(LIC_date, ferritin_date, units = "days")))) %>%
    filter(LIC_ferritin_period <= 180) %>%
    group_by(record_id, LIC_date) %>% #if a single value matches to multiple values, take the closet one
    slice_min(LIC_ferritin_period, with_ties = FALSE, na_rm = TRUE)

LIC_ferritin %>% ggplot(aes(x = ferritin, y = LIC)) +
  geom_point(color = "black", size = 3.5, alpha = 0.6) + # Scatter points
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") + # Regression line
  stat_regline_equation(label.x = 7500, label.y = 50, aes(label = ..eq.label..), 
                        size = 8) + # Equation
  stat_regline_equation(label.x = 7500, # R-squared
                        label.y = 40, 
                        aes(label = paste(..rr.label..)), 
                        parse = TRUE, # Enables proper superscript
                        size = 8) + # Increase text size
  labs(title = "LIC vs. Ferritin Correlation",
       x = "Ferritin (ng/mL)",
       y = "LIC (mg Fe/g dry wt)") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = plot_title_text_size),    # Title text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size), # Y-axis title size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = axis_text_size),  # X-axis labels size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size)   # Y-axis labels size
  )  
  # theme_minimal() 
```


# Sensitivity analysis
## Overall survival: Subgroup analysis for pre-transplant LIC binary classification
### sickle cell disease --- Overall survival: Subgroup analysis for pre-transplant LIC binary levels

- In this subgroup analysis: I have to remove the transplant type from the list of covariates. 
- The LIC cut-off for high vs. low is 8

```{r pre_LIC_binary_OS_disease_subgroup_scd}
table1(~age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined + LIC_level_1_binary + has_busulfan| survival_5yr, 
        data = pre_LIC_cox %>% mutate(survival_5yr = ifelse(survival_5yr ==1, "Dead", "Survived")) %>%
                filter(scd_type == "sickle cell disease"), 
        overall = FALSE, 
        caption = "Overall survival at 5-yr following transplant --- sickle cell disease")     

pre_LIC_os_scd <- pre_LIC_cox %>%
    # filter(!(transplant_type_combined %in% c("mismatched related", "mismatched unrelated", "autologous/genetherapy"))) %>%
    cox_fit_plot(time_var = "survival_time_5yr_censored", 
                status_var = "survival_5yr", 
                covariates = c("LIC_level_1_binary", "age_at_ce", "gender", "has_busulfan"),
                iron_level_var = "LIC_level_1_binary", 
                plot_labels = c("Pre-transplant LIC binary levels", "Overall survival probability"),
                sub_group = "sickle cell disease")

print(pre_LIC_os_scd$p)
cox_sum(pre_LIC_os_scd$fit) %>% prettify_kable()
```

### aplastic anemia --- Overall survival: Subgroup analysis for pre-transplant LIC binary levels

- In this subgroup analysis: I have to remove the transplant type from the list of covariates. 

```{r pre_LIC_binary_OS_disease_subgroup_aa}
table1(~age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined + LIC_level_1_binary + has_busulfan| survival_5yr, 
        data = pre_LIC_cox %>% mutate(survival_5yr = ifelse(survival_5yr ==1, "Dead", "Survived")) %>%
                filter(scd_type == "aplastic anemia"), 
        overall = FALSE, 
        caption = "Overall survival at 5-yr following transplant --- aplastic anemia")     

pre_LIC_os_aa <- pre_LIC_cox %>%
    # filter((transplant_type_combined == "matched unrelated/mismatched unrelated/mismatched related")) %>% distinct(transplant_type_combined)
    cox_fit_plot(time_var = "survival_time_5yr_censored", 
                status_var = "survival_5yr", 
                covariates = c("LIC_level_1_binary", "age_at_ce", "gender", "has_busulfan"),
                iron_level_var = "LIC_level_1_binary", 
                plot_labels = c("Pre-transplant LIC binary levels", "Overall survival probability"),
                sub_group = "aplastic anemia")

print(pre_LIC_os_aa$p)
cox_sum(pre_LIC_os_aa$fit) %>% prettify_kable()
```

### beta thalassemia major  --- Overall survival: Subgroup analysis for pre-transplant LIC binary levels

```{r pre_LIC_binary_OS_disease_subgroup_btm}
table1(~age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined + LIC_level_1_binary + has_busulfan| survival_5yr, 
        data = pre_LIC_cox %>% mutate(survival_5yr = ifelse(survival_5yr ==1, "Dead", "Survived")) %>%
                filter(scd_type == "beta thalassemia major"), 
        overall = FALSE, 
        caption = "Overall survival at 5-yr following transplant --- beta thalassemia major")     

pre_LIC_os_btm <- pre_LIC_cox %>%
    filter(!(transplant_type_combined %in% c("autologous/genetherapy"))) %>%
    cox_fit_plot(time_var = "survival_time_5yr_censored", 
                status_var = "survival_5yr", 
                covariates = c("LIC_level_1_binary", "age_at_ce", "gender", "has_busulfan", "transplant_type_combined"),
                iron_level_var = "LIC_level_1_binary", 
                plot_labels = c("Pre-transplant LIC binary levels", "Overall survival probability"),
                sub_group = "beta thalassemia major")

print(pre_LIC_os_btm$p)
cox_sum(pre_LIC_os_btm$fit) %>% prettify_kable()
```

## Overall survival: Subgroup analysis for pre-transplant ferritin levels
### aplastic anemia  --- Overall survival: Subgroup analysis for pre-transplant ferritin levels
```{r pre_ferritin_OS_disease_subgroup_aa}
table1(~age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined + ferritin_pre + has_busulfan| survival_5yr, 
        data = pre_ferritin_cox %>% mutate(survival_5yr = ifelse(survival_5yr ==1, "Dead", "Survived")) %>%
                filter(scd_type == "aplastic anemia"), 
        overall = FALSE, 
        caption = "Overall survival at 5-yr following transplant --- aplastic anemia")                          

pre_ferritin_os_aa <- pre_ferritin_cox %>%
    filter(!(transplant_type_combined %in% c("Unknown", "autologous/genetherapy"))) %>%
    cox_fit_plot(time_var = "survival_time_5yr_censored", 
                status_var = "survival_5yr", 
                covariates = c("ferritin_pre", "age_at_ce", "gender", "transplant_type_combined", "has_busulfan"),
                iron_level_var = "ferritin_pre", 
                plot_labels = c("Pre-transplant ferritin levels", "Overall survival probability"),
                sub_group = "aplastic anemia")
print(pre_ferritin_os_aa$p)
cox_sum(pre_ferritin_os_aa$fit) %>% prettify_kable()
```

### sickle cell disease  --- Overall survival: Subgroup analysis for pre-transplant ferritin levels
```{r pre_ferritin_OS_disease_subgroup_scd}
table1(~age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined + ferritin_pre + has_busulfan| survival_5yr, 
        data = pre_ferritin_cox %>% mutate(survival_5yr = ifelse(survival_5yr ==1, "Dead", "Survived")) %>%
                filter(scd_type == "sickle cell disease"), 
        overall = FALSE, 
        caption = "Overall survival at 5-yr following transplant --- sickle cell disease")                          

pre_ferritin_os_scd <- pre_ferritin_cox %>%
    filter((transplant_type_combined %in% c("matched related", "matched unrelated/mismatched unrelated/mismatched related"))) %>%
    cox_fit_plot(time_var = "survival_time_5yr_censored", 
                status_var = "survival_5yr", 
                covariates = c("ferritin_pre", "age_at_ce", "gender", "has_busulfan","transplant_type_combined"),
                iron_level_var = "ferritin_pre", 
                plot_labels = c("Pre-transplant ferritin levels", "Overall survival probability"),
                sub_group = "sickle cell disease")

print(pre_ferritin_os_scd$p)
cox_sum(pre_ferritin_os_scd$fit) %>% prettify_kable()
```

### beta thalassemia major  --- Overall survival: Subgroup analysis for pre-transplant ferritin levels
```{r pre_ferritin_OS_disease_subgroup_btm}
table1(~age_at_ce + gender + transplant_type_combined + ferritin_pre + has_busulfan| survival_5yr, 
        data = pre_ferritin_cox %>% mutate(survival_5yr = ifelse(survival_5yr ==1, "Dead", "Survived")) %>%
                filter(scd_type == "beta thalassemia major"), 
        overall = FALSE, 
        caption = "Overall survival at 5-yr following transplant --- beta thalassemia major")     

pre_ferritin_os_btm <- pre_ferritin_cox %>%
    filter(!(transplant_type_combined %in% c("autologous/genetherapy"))) %>%
    cox_fit_plot(time_var = "survival_time_5yr_censored", 
                status_var = "survival_5yr", 
                covariates = c("ferritin_pre", "age_at_ce", "gender", "has_busulfan", "transplant_type_combined"),
                iron_level_var = "ferritin_pre", 
                plot_labels = c("Pre-transplant ferritin levels", "Overall survival probability"),
                sub_group = "beta thalassemia major")

print(pre_ferritin_os_btm$p)
cox_sum(pre_ferritin_os_btm$fit) %>% prettify_kable()

# pre_ferritin_cox_1 %>% filter(scd_type == "sickle cell disease") %>%
#       group_by(transplant_type_combined, survival_5yr) %>% summarise(n = n_distinct(record_id))
```
